item.title: AVID Medical, Inc.: Halyard CARDIAC CATH TRAY SHANDS JAX kit. Model Number: SHND401-04, SHND401-05. Recall
item.product: Halyard CARDIAC CATH TRAY SHANDS JAX kit. Model Number: SHND401-04, SHND401-05.
item.summary: Potential risk for Medline syringe rotating adaptor unwinding during use, which may result in a loose connection and/or full disconnection between the syringe and manifold. Product details: Halyard CARDIAC CATH TRAY SHANDS JAX kit. Model Number: SHND401-04, SHND401-05.
item.affectedPeople: US distribution to FL, IL, MO, MS, NC, NE, TX.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
